checks.details: Credit limit changes use BigDecimal. No floating-point operations in monetary calculations
Card update is transactional. Expiry date validation prevents past dates. Status transitions follow valid state machine
Authentication required. Card number masking in logs. No sensitive data in error responses
Update validation matches COBOL EDIT-CARD-DATA paragraph. All 22 test scenarios pass including edge cases
Record DTOs, Javadoc with COBOL refs, 93% line coverage, 86% branch coverage
